subcodes.first_line: Praised be Thou, O Lord my God! I implore Thee by Thine Ancient Beauty and Most Great Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بجمال القدم و اسمک الاعظم الذی فدیته لحیوه من فی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God
